       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

args.sql:
SELECT t.teigid
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t
JOIN stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
  ON ST_Intersects(t.omrade, s.omrade)
WHERE t.kommunenummer = '4204'
GROUP BY t.teigid
ORDER BY t.teigid ASC
LIMIT 10;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS bbox_wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 3 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 3, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons within the municipality extent

5.description: collapse to one row per teig

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform((SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'), ST_SRID(omrade)));
